summary: Iteration 57 - Verified AlertDialog implementation for all delete operations. All window.confirm() calls have been replaced with AlertDialog modals. Backend DELETE APIs (cases, reports) work correctly with 100% test pass rate. Progress analysis endpoint POST /api/cases/{case_id}/progress-analysis works. AI Analyse Progress button has proper gradient purple-blue styling.
critical_code_review_comments: All delete operations verified to use AlertDialog instead of window.confirm() - mobile Safari compatibility fix complete
AlertDialog imports and implementations found in Dashboard.jsx (line 681), CaseDetail.jsx (lines 1408, 1426, 1442), ReportsSection.jsx (line 527)
No window.confirm() calls remain in the codebase
AI Analyse Progress button properly styled with gradient from-purple-600 to-blue-600

success_rate.frontend: Code verification passed - all AlertDialog implementations verified

seed_data_creation: Test cases created and cleaned up during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: AlertDialog fix verified via code review. Backend DELETE APIs work correctly. All window.confirm() replaced with AlertDialog modals in: 1) Dashboard.jsx delete case, 2) CaseDetail.jsx delete case/event/ground, 3) ReportsSection.jsx delete report. UI testing on mobile viewport (390x844) was attempted but required Google OAuth login which is not fully automatable. The code structure confirms the fix is correctly implemented.

window_confirm_removed.issue: window.confirm() doesn't work reliably on mobile Safari
window_confirm_removed.fix: All confirmations now use AlertDialog modals from @radix-ui/react-alert-dialog

alert_dialog_styling.all_delete_buttons: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white class on AlertDialogAction
